title: Xtra Pillowy Russian Date Pilaf
description: A sour, pillowy, kid-friendly Russian dish featuring pitted dates, cooked to perfection in a tandoor, following ayurvedic-sattvic principles.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the basmati rice in a fine mesh strainer until the water runs clear.
Soak the rice in water for 30 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the tandoor and add the tandoor spice blend, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the pitted dates and cook, stirring frequently, until they are lightly browned.
Add the soaked and drained rice to the tandoor, stirring to combine with the dates and spice blend.
Add the lemon juice, salt, and water to the tandoor, stirring to combine.
Cover the tandoor and cook for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
